title: perezia calophylla
intro: Perezia calophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Andes mountain range of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Perezia calophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the leaves with a solvent, to harness its medicinal properties.
